name: Hillenbrand, Inc.
description: Hillenbrand, Inc. is a global industrial company that provides highly-engineered, mission-critical processing equipment and solutions to customers in a variety of industries around the world. The company's portfolio includes leading brands that serve sectors such as plastics, food, recycling, and chemicals. Hillenbrand is committed to delivering innovative technologies and services that help customers improve efficiency, productivity, and sustainability in their operations.
